Petition For Court Approval Of Creditor Claim Of Joan Sohn And For Apporval Of Agreement To Be Included In Order Of Distribution Of This Estate
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Barbara Bender appeared by telephone for Joan Sohn.

The Court stated that Grant Tomioka was not objecting, that he would not be appearing today and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Continued To May-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Continued To Apr-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon, San Francisco Public Guardian and Administrator for Estate of Arthur Sohn. Barbara Bender appearing via COURT CALL for Petitioner: Joan Sohn.

The Court stated that the request had not been met. Ms. Bender stated that she was seeking an appointed attorney or guardian ad litem for Ms. Ratshin. Mr. Ferdon stated that Ms. Ratshin was under an LPS conservatorship for the person only, that no conservator of the estate was appointed, raised concern about the mental health issues and stated that any agreements made by the family should be investigated. Mr. Ferdon requested the court review the LPS issues of joint conservatorship for the person and estate. Ms. Bender concurred with the request to expedite and for resolution of the matter. She also noted that there should be only one counsel to handle the issues. The Court took the matter under submission, will consult with Judge Dearman and the examiner for the best suited counsel to be appointed as guardian ad litem or as counsel. The Petition was continued to April 16, 2008.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: C. Casey CSR#8098. Bailiff: R. Harris. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/R. Noguera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-13-2008 Continued To Mar-11-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
